artifact_name: M13 Runtime-Enforced Approval Gate Evidence Pattern
m11_status_boundary: M11 remains complete and is not reopened by M13 operational hardening.
m12_status_boundary: M12 remains complete and is not reopened by M13 operational hardening.
purpose: Define evidence that proves whether runtime approval gates observed, advised, or enforced approval before a governed tool call executed.

approval_gate_modes.description: The runtime records approval-related state or events without blocking execution.
approval_gate_modes.boundary: Observed approval evidence is valid as observation only and must not satisfy enforced approval requirements.

approval_gate_modes.description: The runtime recommends approval handling or review but does not block execution.
approval_gate_modes.boundary: Advisory approval evidence must not satisfy enforced approval requirements.

approval_gate_modes.description: The runtime blocks the requested tool call, binds approval to that blocked call, releases the call after approval, and records execution after release.
approval_gate_modes.boundary: Enforced approval evidence is satisfied only when gate, approval, release, and execution ordering and binding evidence are complete.

verification_rules.description: Enforced approval must include a gate or block event before tool execution.
Approval must occur before tool-call release and execution.
The approval event must be bound to the blocked tool call.
Advisory approval evidence must not satisfy enforced approval requirements.
Approval recorded after release or execution fails enforced-gate verification.
Missing ordering or binding evidence should fail closed for enforced approval verification.

regression_fixtures.description: Valid halt -> approval -> release -> execution trace.
Observed-only trace is valid as observation and not enforcement.

trace.observation_boundary: Observed-only traces may support audit review but do not satisfy enforced approval.

regression_fixtures.description: Post-facto advisory approval must fail enforced-gate verification.
regression_fixtures.negative_fixture_boundary: This is a deterministic negative fixture and not allowed behavior.

regression_fixtures.description: Approval-state-only trace must fail enforced-gate verification because it lacks gate, ordering, and binding evidence.
regression_fixtures.negative_fixture_boundary: This is a deterministic negative fixture and not allowed behavior.

governance_boundary_statement: Runtime approval evidence may prove whether a gate observed, advised, or enforced approval. It must not itself approve execution, accept risk, seal Decision Proof, execute rollback, execute fail-closed, close audits, or make final governance judgments.
aaos_retained_authority_statement: AAOS retains approval doctrine, identity trust chain, policy authority, decision routing, escalation semantics, fail-closed policy, rollback policy, Decision Proof sealing logic, audit final judgment, release authority, and final governance authority.
sovereignty_statement: AAOS remains the decision sovereignty layer.
